assessment.note: She names a concrete clarity gap around how success is measured in the new setup, with a mild implied growth constraint; [THREAD-DEFERRED] success is being measured in this new setup.

new_queue.label: Manager support
new_queue.name: What would you want more of from me right now?
new_queue.description: Makes support concrete and lets her ask for what she needs without having to self-diagnose first.

new_queue.label: Next-step focus
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, where do you want to focus first?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning the conversation into a concrete next move without opening a new thread.
